headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -37.8)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 113% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 110 quotes including 74 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and annoyance today.

• The frustration score of 49.9 sits in the lower-middle range but represents a significant jump from yesterday's 22.9.

• Optimism rebounded sharply from yesterday's deep negative territory, while fears remained stable at quiet levels.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
